# Neo Platform API

> Behavioral memory layer for B2B products. Multi-tenant context via REST.

## Read first

- Documentation (guides + agent prompts): https://nura.sh/neo/docs
- OpenAPI 3.1 (full endpoint reference): https://neo.nura.sh/v1/openapi.json

## Essentials

- Base URL: https://neo.nura.sh/v1
- Auth: Authorization: Bearer sk-neo-acct-...
- Context scoping: X-Neo-Workspace, X-Neo-Tenant-Id (required on /v1/context/*)
- Dashboard: https://neo.nura.sh/platform

Do not duplicate endpoint lists here — use OpenAPI for schemas and paths, docs for integration guides.
